response.justification: The candidate has relevant experience in full-stack development with TypeScript and React, but the seniority level is higher than required and some skills are not directly aligned with the job description.
strengths: Experience with full-stack development and various tech stacks
Strong background in software development with multiple programming languages
concerns: Seniority level is higher than required for the position
Some skills mentioned are not directly relevant to the job description
Lack of direct experience with PostgreSQL and Nest.js
